title: Indulgent Portuguese Cheese Fondue
description: A nutty and gooey Portuguese dish featuring red pepper flakes, this fondue is perfect for a fun and indulgent evening with friends and family, made in a traditional fondue pot and incorporating tadka for added depth of flavor, while also being ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly
instructions: Heat the fondue pot over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute
Add the white wine and lemon juice and bring to a simmer
Reduce the heat to low and add the shredded gruyere cheese
Stir until the cheese is melted and smooth
Add the crumbly portuguese cheese and stir until well combined
Add the red pepper flakes and tadka spice blend and stir to combine
Transfer the fondue to the fondue pot and serve hot
